responsibilities: Provide external entry points for system interaction
Convert incoming data formats into domain-friendly structures
Manage request validation and error propagation to callers

English.purpose: This document defines the public API and interface layer of the ArchSpine system, serving as the contract between external callers and the internal domain.
English.context_and_audience: Intended for developers integrating with the system, API consumers, and maintainers responsible for request handling and validation.
key_takeaways: The API layer is the sole external entry point for system interaction.
It is responsible for data format conversion and validation.
Error propagation is managed here to ensure consistent responses.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档定义了 ArchSpine 系统的公共 API 与接口层，作为外部调用者与内部领域之间的契约。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 面向与系统集成的开发者、API 使用者，以及负责请求处理和验证的维护人员。
key_takeaways: API 层是系统唯一的外部入口点。
负责数据格式转换和请求验证。
在此层管理错误传播，确保一致的响应格式。
